title: BLDP 2021-2022 Earnings Outlook and Guidance
text: Ballard Power Systems provided challenging guidance for 2022 following strong 2021 results. For Q2 2022, consensus EPS estimate was -$0.12 (-71.4% Y/Y) and consensus revenue estimate was $23.94M (-5.0% Y/Y). Over the previous 2 years, BLDP had beaten EPS estimates only 13% of the time and beaten revenue estimates only 25% of the time. Over the 3 months prior to Q2, EPS estimates saw 2 upward revisions and 6 downward revisions, while revenue estimates saw 0 upward revisions and 13 downward revisions. For Q3 2022, consensus EPS estimate was -$0.14 (-40.0% Y/Y) and consensus revenue estimate was $23.94M (-5.0% Y/Y). BLDP had beaten EPS estimates 0% of the time and beaten revenue estimates only 25% of the time in the prior year. The previews indicated challenging earnings expectations for Ballard throughout 2022 with negative earnings per share and downward estimate revisions. The company increased 2022 operating cost guidance to $140-160 million (50% increase from 2021) and capex to $40-60 million, reflecting significant investments in product development and manufacturing.
